personalContext.summary: Bilingual individual (Chinese/English) focused on systematic algorithmic skill development through disciplined LeetCode practice.

topOfMind.summary: Maintains rigorous daily LeetCode study routine with structured Markdown documentation; on 2026-04-19 completed 10 unique problems from 18 submissions (difficulty distribution Easy×1, Medium×8, Hard×1), exceeding typical 6-problem target. Successfully solved Daily Challenge (#1855 Maximum Distance Between a Pair of Values) and expanded problem portfolio to include #101045 Multi Source Flood Fill, #101046-101047 Smallest Stable Index I & II, #560 Subarray Sum Equals K, #3783 Mirror Distance of an Integer, #42 Trapping Rain Water, #15 3Sum, and #11 Container With Most Water. Actively practices diverse algorithmic techniques including Dynamic Programming, BFS, Two Pointers, Hash Tables, Prefix Sums, DFS, Tree traversal, Topological Sort, Backtracking, Greedy algorithms, Binary Search, and Monotonic Stack. Documents progress via comprehensive Markdown summaries stored locally in /mnt/user-data/outputs/ directory with automatic filename convention leetcode_daily_summary_YYYYMMDD.md.

recentMonths.summary: Engaged in consistent daily LeetCode practice with documented study sessions spanning multiple algorithm categories. On 2026-04-15, completed 6 problems including Word Break (DP), Binary Tree Max Path Sum (DFS/Tree), Course Schedule II (Topological Sort), Permutations (Backtracking), Jump Game II (Greedy), and Coin Change (DP). On 2026-04-19, achieved 10 unique problems from 18 submissions (updated from previous 15-count record) with difficulty distribution Easy×1, Medium×8, Hard×1, including Multi Source Flood Fill (#101045), Smallest Stable Index I & II (#101046, #101047), Maximum Distance Between a Pair of Values (#1855) Daily Challenge, Subarray Sum Equals K (#560), Mirror Distance of an Integer (#3783), Trapping Rain Water (#42), 3Sum (#15), Container With Most Water (#11), Moving Zeroes (Easy), and others. Encountered tool failure with leetcode_get_recent_ac_submissions returning empty results, resolved by switching to leetcode_get_all_submissions tool to retrieve complete submission data. Generates comprehensive Markdown summaries with problem links, complexity tables, technique analysis, and performance metrics. Maintains GitHub integration preference but prioritizes local storage reliability through outputs directory fallback mechanism.

longTermBackground.summary: Demonstrates strong interest in algorithmic problem-solving and systematic skill development. Shows disciplined approach to technical learning with documentation and version control practices.
